_comment: pr_polish mode schema. Merge with base.json at PLAN time.

task.source_url: string — GitHub PR URL being polished

polish.findings: array of {id, category, description, severity, file, line} — issues found during investigation
polish.allowed_actions: array of strings — e.g. ['fix_typos', 'improve_test_coverage', 'clean_commit_message']. Populated at PLAN. No action outside this list.
polish.requires_approval: boolean — must be true; no public mutation without explicit user approval

transition_guards.INVESTIGATE → PLAN: polish.findings must be non-empty array (empty = nothing to polish = BLOCKED)
transition_guards.PACKAGE → APPROVAL: polish.requires_approval must be true and approval.md must preview all proposed changes
transition_guards.APPROVAL → POSTMORTEM: polish.allows_actions must match state.approval.approved_actions exactly before any public action
